makecode_ts.source:
let number = 0
input.onGesture(Gesture.Shake, function () {
    basic.clearScreen()
    number = Math.randomRange(1, 6)
    if (number == 1) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            `)
    } else if (number == 2) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            `)
    } else if (number == 3) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . #
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . . . . .
            # . . . .
            `)
    } else if (number == 4) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            # . . . #
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            `)
    } else if (number == 5) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            # . . . #
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            `)
    } else {
        basic.showLeds(`
            # . . . #
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            `)
    }
})

micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import random

while True:
    if accelerometer.was_gesture('shake'):
        number = random.randint(1, 6)
        if number == 1:
            display.show(Image(
            "00000:"
            "00000:"
            "00900:"
            "00000:"
            "00000"))
        elif number == 2:
            display.show(Image(
            "00000:"
            "00000:"
            "90009:"
            "00000:"
            "00000"))
        elif number == 3:
            display.show(Image(
            "00009:"
            "00000:"
            "00900:"
            "00000:"
            "90000"))
        elif number == 4:
            display.show(Image(
            "90009:"
            "00000:"
            "00000:"
            "00000:"
            "90009"))
        elif number == 5:
            display.show(Image(
            "90009:"
            "00000:"
            "00900:"
            "00000:"
            "90009"))
        else:
            display.show(Image(
            "90009:"
            "00000:"
            "90009:"
            "00000:"
            "90009"))
